description: A two-generation agent episode with one text statistics tool call.

initial_messages.content: You are an agent benchmark participant. Keep outputs brief and do not call tools directly; the runtime executes tools.

generations.name: plan_text_stats
generations.prompt: We need character count, word count, and uppercase form for the text 'EdgeVisor agent backend'. State in one short sentence that the text_stats tool should be used.

generations.name: final_answer
generations.prompt: The text_stats tool returned: {tool_result} Summarize these fields in one short sentence.
